rnalType":"bytes","name":"data","type":"bytes"}],"name":"receiveReceipt","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"newAuthority","type":"address"}],"name":"setAuthority","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Designed to be called by an XCM origin (or a relay contract) after a      cross-chain operation completes.  Duplicate delivery \u2014 which is possible      under at-least-once XCM semantics \u2014 is rejected idempotently via the      `processed` mapping.      Access control: `receiveReceipt` is restricted via AccessManaged so that      only the authorised relay/bridge caller (wired by the AccessManager admin)      can submit receipts.  This prevents any arbitrary account from spoofing a      receipt and consuming a correlationId before the legitimate XCM delivery      arrives.","events":{"AuthorityUpdated(address)":{"details":"Authority that manages this contract was updated."},"ReceiptReceived(bytes32,address,bytes)":{"params":{"correlationId":"Unique identifier linking the receipt to its origin.","data":"Opaque payload attached to the receipt.","sender":"msg.sender that delivered the receipt."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"authority()":{"details":"Returns the current authority."},"constructor":{"params":{"authority_":"The AccessManager that governs this contract. Prevents denial of service for delayed restricted calls in the case that the contract performs attacker controlled calls."},"receiveReceipt(bytes32,bytes)":{"details":"Restricted: only the authorised relay caller (wired via AccessManager)         may call this function.  Reverts with `DuplicateCorrelationId` if         `correlationId` was already received.  Marks the ID as processed         before emitting to prevent re-entrancy from causing double-processing.","params":{"correlationId":"Unique identifier for this receipt.","data":"Arbitrary payload delivered with the receipt."}},"setAuthority(address)":{"details":"Transfers control to a new authority. params.authority_: The AccessManager that governs this contract.                   Must grant the desired relay/bridge address the role                   that is mapped to `receiveReceipt` before any receipt                   can be submitted.

returns._0: True if the receipt was already accepted; false otherwise.

isConsumingScheduledOp().details: Returns true only in the context of a delayed restricted call, at the moment that the scheduled operation is being consumed. Prevents denial of service for delayed restricted calls in the case that the contract performs attacker controlled calls.

receiveReceipt(bytes32,bytes).details: Restricted: only the authorised relay caller (wired via AccessManager)         may call this function.  Reverts with `DuplicateCorrelationId` if         `correlationId` was already received.  Marks the ID as processed         before emitting to prevent re-entrancy from causing double-processing.

params.data: Arbitrary payload delivered with the receipt.

setAuthority(address).details: Transfers control to a new authority. The caller must be the current authority.

hasProcessed(bytes32).notice: Returns whether a correlationId has already been processed.

processed(bytes32).notice: True when a correlationId has already been processed.
